title: kyllinga planiculmis
intro: Kyllinga planiculmis, also known as flat-flower kyllinga, is a type of grass-like plant that belongs to the sedge family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Kyllinga planiculmis include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
